mapper.select: SELECT id, demand_id, title, type, category, urgency, status, user_id, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, email, location, description, specifications, budget, deadline, publish_date, tags, requirements, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM supply_demands ORDER BY publish_date DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT id, demand_id, title, type, category, urgency, status, user_id, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, email, location, description, specifications, budget, deadline, publish_date, tags, requirements, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM supply_demands WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, demand_id, title, type, category, urgency, status, user_id, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, email, location, description, specifications, budget, deadline, publish_date, tags, requirements, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM supply_demands WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY publish_date DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supply_demands ( demand_id, title, type, category, urgency, status, user_id, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, email, location, description, specifications, budget, deadline, publish_date, tags, requirements, view_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{demandId}, #{title}, #{type}, #{category}, #{urgency}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{companyName}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{email}, #{location}, #{description}, #{specifications}, #{budget}, #{deadline}, #{publishDate}, #{tags}, #{requirements}, #{viewCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE supply_demands SET title = #{title}, type = #{type}, category = #{category}, urgency = #{urgency}, company_name = #{companyName}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, email = #{email}, location = #{location}, description = #{description}, specifications = #{specifications}, budget = #{budget}, deadline = #{deadline}, tags = #{tags}, requirements = #{requirements}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE supply_demands SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, demand_id, title, type, category, urgency, status, user_id, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, email, location, description, specifications, budget, deadline, publish_date, tags, requirements, view_count, created_at, updated_at FROM supply_demands ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
